memory:memory/2026-04-14.md:398:423.snippet: - Eddie's workspace lacks `data/agents/` structure — different organization than Stella's - **Manifold Federation Design Brainstorm** - **Option 1 (Sync/Union)**: All manifold servers sync to maintain identical agent graphs - Pros: Single source of truth, easy queries, simple mental model - Cons: Consistency hell at scale, O(n²) network overhead, conflict resolution complexity - **Verdict**: Doesn't scale past ~10-50 machines - **Option 2 (Federated Hubs) — RECOMMENDED**: - Each manifold is independent hub with local mesh - Agents query local first, then peer hubs via WebSocket bridge - Capability-based discovery (find by what they do, not where they are)
